detail.description: Everson Pereira singles on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile.
Everson Pereira singles on a ground ball to left fielder James Wood. Miguel Vargas scores. Colson Montgomery to 2nd.
Everson Pereira singles on a ground ball to shortstop CJ Abrams.
Everson Pereira homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.
Everson Pereira singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
Everson Pereira homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Chase Meidroth scores. Munetaka Murakami scores.
Everson Pereira doubles (4) on a fly ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom, deflected by center fielder Denzel Clarke.
Everson Pereira singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Chase Meidroth to 3rd. Miguel Vargas to 2nd.
Everson Pereira doubles (3) on a fly ball to shortstop Jacob Wilson, deflected by left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.
Everson Pereira doubles (2) on a pop up to right fielder Carlos Cortes.
Everson Pereira singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Blake Perkins. Colson Montgomery to 3rd.
Everson Pereira homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.
Everson Pereira singles on a ground ball to right fielder Corbin Carroll.
Everson Pereira singles on a line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Munetaka Murakami to 2nd.
Everson Pereira singles on a line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Tristan Peters to 2nd.
Everson Pereira doubles (1) on a ground ball to left fielder Griffin Conine.
